items.title: Address review findings: docs, robustness, and Colab fixes
items.snippet: Follow-up to the prefill removal, applying findings from a multi-reviewer pass over the notebook and a live re-execution.  Tutorial text and outputs: - The intro steps now cover installing the SDK, where the generated   prompt appears, and the VARIABLE_VALUES step for custom tasks. - New prose expla

items.title: CI: fail the notebook-tests job when a changed notebook fails to execute (#772)
items.snippet: The maintainer-gated execution step in notebook-tests.yml runs each CHANGED notebook against the live API and counts failures, but nothing ever read that count: the step never exits non-zero (each per-notebook failure is absorbed by its if/else), it carries continue-on-error, and the "Final status c

items.title: Fix metaprompt notebook: remove assistant prefill (400 on current models)
items.snippet: The metaprompt (prompt generator) notebook has been broken for every user since #375 bumped its model from claude-sonnet-4-5 to claude-sonnet-4-6. The prompt-writing call ended its messages array with an assistant prefill turn, and claude-sonnet-4-6 (like every model since the 4.6 generation) reject

items.title: Merge pull request #754 from bradabrams/add-plan-big-execute-small-cookbook
items.snippet: Add coordinator-pattern cost cookbook: big models plan, small models execute

items.title: lychee.toml: list 2xx/3xx codes in accept explicitly
items.snippet: The accept option replaces lychee's default accepted set rather than extending it, so [403, 429] alone rejects every 200. This was masked until now because the config failed to parse and lychee silently ran with defaults.

items.title: Make notebook cross-links checkable; document the temp_md artifact
items.snippet: The check-links workflow converts changed notebooks into a flat temp_md/ dir, which breaks resolution of every relative file link - this is why existing notebooks use absolute GitHub URLs. Follow the convention for the sibling-notebook links (they exist on main, so they now get genuinely checked ove

items.title: lychee.toml: drop skip_code_blocks, also removed in lychee 0.23
items.snippet: Code blocks are already skipped by default (include_verbatim defaults to false), so the field just goes.

items.title: Fix lychee.toml for lychee 0.23: headers field was renamed
items.snippet: The check-links workflow has been failing to parse the config (unknown field 'headers'), so links were never actually checked. The only header set was the user agent, which has a dedicated option.

items.title: Fix pre-existing verify-urls failures
items.snippet: registry.yaml: the fable_5_fallback_billing entry used 'Safeguards' and 'Billing', neither of which is in the registry schema's category enum - trimmed to 'Responses'. authors.yaml: benlehrburger-ant's website no longer resolves; point it at the GitHub profile instead.

items.title: Apply internal review fixes and add architecture diagram
items.snippet: Review fixes (comments and prose only, recorded outputs untouched): a fourth honest caveat documenting that the committed run's own park list is wrong at #10 (facts were verified; question decomposition was not - which is the sharpest lesson in the notebook), the PRICES comment now names Sonnet 5's

items.title: Add coordinator-pattern cost cookbook: big models plan, small models execute
items.snippet: New managed_agents notebook on the economics of the multiagent coordinator config: a frontier coordinator (Fable 5) plans and synthesizes while cheap workers (Sonnet 5, scoped to web_search + web_fetch) do the token-hungry reading in parallel threads.
